blended.narrative: Hoodoo is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,477 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 5".
